name: Cloud Computing Synopsis and Recommendations
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-146 (2012) elaborates the SP 800-145 definitions with detailed cloud architecture, deployment models, and security considerations.
relationToCloudSecurity: Companion document to 800-145; provides more substantive cloud-security treatment.
relationToAISecurity: Generic cloud-security treatment; AI workloads inherit the security considerations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).
